headline: Keysight Introduces Hands-On Semiconductor Teaching Labs for Universities
summary: SANTA ROSA, Calif., March 24, 2026--Launches three new solutions, designed for students studying semiconductor research, development, and manufacturing.

headline: Can Rising AI Tool Adoption Lift Synopsys' Design Automation Revenues?
summary: SNPS rides on AI-driven demand as Design Automation revenues surge 96%, with AI tools boosting chip design speed and expanding growth opportunities.
